'''Françoise Mouly''' (born [[October 24]], [[1950s|1955]]) is a comic book creator who worked on a few issues in the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] comic series. In the late 1970s she and her husband [[Wikipedia:Art Spiegelman|Art Spiegelman]] founded the ground breaking underground comic anthology [[Wikipedia:RAW (magazine)|''RAW'']]. She has held the position of art editor at [[Wikipedia:The New Yorker|''The New Yorker'']] since [[1993]], and more recently Mouly and Speigelman have launched a Raw Junior division as well as collaborated on a comic anthology for children call ''Little Lit''.
